summary: Site health is good. Test suite: 3692 passed, 0 failed. All 14 data-source external links return 200. Build diff is date-stamp only (new Date() in generate-html.js:29 — expected daily behavior, not data drift). Discoverability infrastructure is complete. No broken review files, no workspace-only files at risk, no Mech-A-bypass candidates, no direction-violation skips. Two moderate findings in the expansion tracker: EXP-435 was integrated (wontfix-already-covered) but not moved to archive — live-state predicate violation; and 43 EXP IDs are missing from the allocator sequence (likely voided batch allocations, next_id=437 is correct, no collision risk). Neither is an emergency. Decider should archive EXP-435 on its next run and optionally create a tracking issue for the ID gaps. Drift audit is fresh (24h, 5 candidates). 1 unprocessed holistic review (8h lag, 0 holes) is normal pipeline lag.
